title: psephellus aucherianus
intro: Psephellus aucherianus, also known as Aucher's scabious, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Psephellus aucherianus include wound healing, soothing skin irritations, and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used topically to promote healing and reduce pain.
